DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-07-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Andrew Caterall, Esq. of Zacks & Freedman (415-956-8100) for Plaintiff/opposing party Annabelle Parfitt.
Hannah Salassi, Esq. of LV & S (415-392-2560 x114) for Defendant/ Moving party Ken Kurita-Ditz.

The Court reads the tentative ruling. ARGUED. Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT KEN KURITA-DITZ's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is OVERRULED, 10 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently alleges a cause of action for declaratory relief. Order is signed in Open Court. (see scanned order for details) Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)
